description_long: This is a heavy, vintage-style safe box constructed primarily from thick, black-painted metal with visible signs of wear and chipping. The front door features ornate gold lettering reading 'MR. FOX RICHARDSON.' and 'HEAD OFFICE SAFE CINNAMON, O.', along with decorative gold accents and a robust, circular combination dial lock. The door is mounted on prominent external hinges and includes a sturdy, horizontally-oriented handle for opening. The safe stands on four short, rounded feet, elevating it slightly above the ground. The interior is not fully visible, but the open door reveals a thick-walled construction, suggesting a secure, hollow compartment inside.
description: A vintage, black metal safe box with gold lettering, a combination dial lock, and a sturdy handle, showing signs of wear and standing on four short feet.
description_view_0: The left side of the safe is visible with the door open, showing the thick door and locking bolts.
description_view_1: The front view displays the ornate gold lettering, combination dial, handle, and external hinges on the right.
description_view_2: The right side of the safe is shown with the door open, highlighting the solid, unadorned metal surface and the door's thickness.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals a plain, black metal back with some wear and no visible features or openings.
attribute_handle_design: horizontal rotating lever handle, centrally placed on the door, metallic
attribute_brand_or_manufacturer_label: Gold printed label on the upper front reading 'MR. FOX RICHARDSON.' and on the door 'HEAD OFFICE SAFE CINNAMON, O.'
